details: Paper PMC11843914 Section 3.1.1.8 reports compound 6h with full IUPAC name and mp 175-177 °C, matching the row exactly.
Paper PMC6146463 reports compound 5c (3-Ethoxycarbonyl-2-(3-hydroxypropyl)-isoquinolinium chloride) with mp = 142-44°C, matching row.
Paper PMC6236423 reports compound 2 (1-Methoxy-4-thiocyanatobenzene) as a brown solid mp. 33-44°C, matching row.
Paper PMC6146434 reports compound 3e (7-Phenyl-9-(4-methoxyphenyl)tetrazolo[1,5-c]-7H-pyrrolo[3,2-e]pyrimidine) mp: 216-18°C, matching row.
Paper PMC6146434 reports compound 3f (7,9-Di(4-methoxyphenyl)tetrazolo[1,5-c]-7H-pyrrolo[3,2-e]pyrimidine) mp: 237-39°C, matching row.
Paper PMC6146434 reports compound 6b (1-Phenyl-N-ethoxymethylene-2-amino-3-cyano-4-(4-methoxyphenyl)pyrrole) mp: 159-60°C, matching row.
Paper PMC6146434 reports compound 6c (1,4-Di(4-methoxyphenyl)-N-ethoxymethylene-2-amino-3-cyanopyrrole) mp: 117-18°C, matching row.
Paper PMC6236348 Table 1 row R=4-Cl gives mp 114-16 °C for 4-Chloro-(diacetoxyiodo)benzene, matching row.
Paper PMC6236348 Table 1 row R=3-Me gives mp 153-55 °C for 3-Methyl-(diacetoxyiodo)benzene, matching row.
Paper PMC6236399 states Tyriverdin 'solid darkens above 60 ºC and gives a blue sublimate at 220 ºC without melting', matching row's sublimation value.
Paper at DOI 10.3390/molecules16053999 reports Stigmasterol (6) White needles; m.p. 155-157 °C, matching row.
Paper PMC3716435 Table 3 'Host melting Tm °C' column lists 243 for 1·DMSO (clathrate B); dehydrocholic acid is the host (compound 1).
Paper at DOI 10.3390/70200189 Table 1 shows TM Z=Ms (9) azide dec. temp 120 °C (footnote c: decomposition temperature as a solid), matching row.
Paper at DOI 10.3390/ma3063625 states 'Gas adsorption of MeO-TEMPO (melting point 313 K)'; 313-273.15=39.85 °C conversion correct.
Paper at DOI 10.1016/B978-0-12-803409-5.00008-2 Section 8.3.10 states Bronopol 'melting at about 130 °C', matching row.
Paper PMC11843341 reports compound 5d mp 178-180 °C, matching row.
